chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: Application No.S-175 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 21.07.2025 Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for respondents No. 5 to 7. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Learned counsel for the applicant states that he is satisfied with the efforts undertaken by the official respondent No.2 SSP Khairpur for recovery of the detenue. In the light of the same he seeks to withdraw the instant application in the hope that the said detenue will be recovered by the above noted respondents. Therefore same is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
